positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration of a joyful, fantastical woodland scene. The main subject is a group of interconnected forest animals—a majestic fox, a curious owl perched on a branch, a mischievous raccoon, and a gentle deer—all interacting in a celebratory, harmonious tableau. The style should be modern kawaii meets vintage engraving, rendered with thick, clean black linework and limited, vibrant color splashes (teal, mustard yellow, sage green). The background should be composed of abstracted, repeating botanical elements (leaves, berries, mushrooms) that frame the central animal cluster, ensuring strong negative space. Composition must be circular and symmetrical, perfect for a chest print on apparel. Dramatic rim lighting effect, clean vector aesthetic, centered composition, highly detailed, designed for sublimation printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, trademark, copyrighted, deep shadows, grayscale, realistic, photorealistic, poorly drawn, out of frame
